svg.title: Architect agent architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full system architecture of the Architect email agent, showing GitHub Actions scheduler, orchestrate.py brain, email stores, send_email.py, Gmail SMTP, and progress tracking.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions cron scheduler work for the Architect agent?')
sendPrompt('What does orchestrate.py do in the Architect agent?')
g.text: reads progress · picks next item · calls sender

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is stored in progress.json for the Architect agent?')
sendPrompt('What are the 20 content emails in the Architect curriculum?')
sendPrompt('What are the 10 checkpoint emails in the Architect curriculum?')
sendPrompt('What does send_email.py do in the Architect agent?')
g.text: MIME build · SSL connect · login · send

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What credentials are stored in config.json for the Architect agent?')
sendPrompt('How does Gmail SMTP SSL work in the Architect agent pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the final email look like when it arrives in the inbox?')
